allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; issues=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total issues: {len\(issues\)}'\); [print\(f'  #{i[\\"number\\"]} {i[\\"title\\"]}'\) for i in sorted\(issues, key=lambda x: x['number']\)]")
Bash(bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 23 && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -25')
Bash(bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 23 && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E "\(error|warn|Error|✓|Failed|compiled\)" | head -30')
Bash(bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 23 && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E "\(error TS|✓ Compiled|Failed\)" | head -10')
Bash(bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 23 && npm run build 2>&1 | grep "error TS" | head -20')
Bash(bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 23 && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -A2 "Failed\\|Type error" | head -30')
Bash(bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 23 && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E "\(error TS|✓ Compiled|Type error|Failed\)" | head -10')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id:', d.get\('id'\), '| title:', d.get\('title'\), '| error:', d.get\('error'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id:', d.get\('id'\), '| error:', d.get\('error'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; vs=[v for v in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if v.startswith\('16.'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(vs[-8:]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; c=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('✓ nf-scale-in' if 'nf-scale-in' in c else '✗ nf-scale-in missing'\); print\('✓ Yeh PG' if 'Yeh PG' in c else '✗ Yeh PG missing'\); print\('✓ nf-banner' if 'nf-banner' in c else '✗ nf-banner missing'\); print\('✓ nf-wave' if 'nf-wave' in c else '✗ nf-wave missing'\); print\('✓ meme strip' if 'book ho gaya' in c else '✗ meme missing'\); print\('✓ waitlist queue' if 'nf-p1' in c else '✗ waitlist missing'\)")
